name: @firstpick/pi-skill-code-quality
description_en: Agents should invoke this skill for code reviews, linting/formatting setup, maintainability checks, complexity concerns, warning cleanup, coding standards, or quality gates in Rust, TypeScript, Python, shell, and mixed repos.
description_zh: 代理应在代码审查、linting/formatting 设置、可维护性检查、复杂性关注、警告清理、编码标准或 Rust、TypeScript、Python、shell 和混合仓库中的质量关卡时调用此技能。
